name: Ever After High RP
description:
A turn in this tale, Rebels and Royals debating, risk life and be free to make your own destiny as a Rebel? Or will you accept your destiny and be a royal?... Eh, who cares about that? I sure don't, let's behest, we're just here for one thing, the characters and adventure, fight some giant dragon, get a princess, maybe two, fuck it maybe all of them! But remember... just hav fun I dunno, I'm still working on making these bios good or something, also, make sure to make up an origin or yours, or save it for later, you're choice
